Title: Logged-in user proceeds from cart to checkout
Preconditions: User is logged in and cart has at least 1 product
Expected_Result: Page navigates to /checkout. 'Address Details' (delivery + billing) and 'Review Your Order' sections are visible.

Title: Delivery and billing address show registered address
Expected_Result: Delivery card shows name, address line 1, address line 2 (if any), city, state, zipcode, country, and phone — matching what was entered at registration.

Title: Review-your-order section lists all cart items
Expected_Result: Each cart product is listed with name, image, price, quantity, and line total. Grand total is the sum of all line totals.

Title: Order comment box accepts text
Steps: 1. Type a comment in the comment box
Expected_Result: Text is accepted up to the field's character limit. No JS error on input.

Title: 'Place Order' navigates to payment page
Expected_Result: Page navigates to /payment. Payment form with Name on Card, Card Number, CVC, Expiration Month, Expiration Year inputs is visible.

Title: Payment form blocks submit with all fields empty
Steps: 1. Leave all payment fields empty  2. Click 'Pay and Confirm Order'
Expected_Result: HTML5 validation tooltips appear on the first empty field. Form is not submitted.

Title: Successful payment redirects to confirmation
Preconditions: User is on /payment with valid cart
Steps: 1. Enter name on card  2. Enter card number  3. Enter CVC  4. Enter expiration month and year  5. Click 'Pay and Confirm Order'
Test_Data: name: Orkhan QA, card: 4111111111111111, cvc: 123, exp: 12/2030
Expected_Result: 'ORDER PLACED!' confirmation page is shown with 'Congratulations! Your order has been confirmed!' message and 'Download Invoice' button.
Notes: Test card — site does not actually charge

Title: Invoice can be downloaded from confirmation
Expected_Result: A .txt or .pdf file downloads with order id, product list, totals, and customer name.

Title: Confirmation page 'Continue' returns to home
Expected_Result: User is redirected to home page. Cart is now empty.

Title: Guest user is forced to register before checkout
Preconditions: User is not logged in and cart has items
Expected_Result: Modal 'Register / Login your account to proceed on checkout!' appears with 'Register / Login' link. User is not taken to /checkout.

Title: Removing the last item during checkout flow handles gracefully
Steps: 1. Navigate back to /view_cart  2. Remove the last item  3. Navigate forward to /checkout
Expected_Result: Either: (a) /checkout redirects to empty cart page OR (b) shows 'Cart is empty' inline. No partial state, no crash.

Title: Card number field accepts only digits
Steps: 1. Type letters and symbols into Card Number
Expected_Result: Either: (a) input strips non-digits OR (b) form is rejected on submit with validation message. No silent acceptance of invalid data.

Title: Expired card year is rejected
Steps: 1. Enter expiration year in the past  2. Submit
Expected_Result: Payment is rejected with clear error message indicating the card has expired. No order is placed.

Title: XSS attempt in comment box is escaped on confirmation
Steps: 1. Enter XSS string in comment  2. Place order
Expected_Result: No JS executes on confirmation page. If comment is rendered, it appears as escaped text.
